name: testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments
title: testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments
syntax: long testWaitForScopeAnalyseBitSegments(message aMessage, ScopeAnalyseBitSegment bitSegments[], dword noOfSegments, dword referenceVoltagePoint, dword flags, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd);
description: Starts an analysis for the defined bit segments for each bit, which is within the defined range. The result of the analysis can be requested with the function testWaitScopeGetAnalysedBitSegments.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: The message where the bits should be analyzed.

parameters.name: SegmentStart
parameters.type: Start of the bit segment in percent of the bit length (100% = nominal bit length)

parameters.name: SegmentEnd
parameters.type: End of the bit segment in percent of the bit length (100% = nominal bit length)

parameters.name: noOfSegments
parameters.description: Number of the bit segments used for the analysis.

parameters.name: referenceVoltagePoint
parameters.description: The reference voltage point within the bit in %.
CAN high signal used for analysis
CAN low signal used for analysis
CAN diff signal used for analysis
CAN common mode voltage (CMV) used for analysis

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: Start and end field of the bit range. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

return: Array that defines the bit segments of a bit for the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
